data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be conclusively validated due to a failure in the evaluation process.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that the exploratory validation was blocked because the LLM evaluation call failed, preventing any conclusive scoring of the scenario. Without a successful evaluation, it is impossible to determine if the expected outcome of the persona scenario is met. This leads to an inconclusive status as there is no supporting evidence to confirm or deny the scenario's behavior.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract for this exploratory requirement.
